Kael.wardrobe_fingerprint: worn leather jacket, dark tactical trousers, no insignia, scuffed boots
Kael.physical_signature: tall, lean, scar across left brow, moves with controlled economy and deliberate stillness
Kael.lighting_affinity: hard side-light from frame-right, high contrast, deep shadows on left side of face

Mira.wardrobe_fingerprint: slate-grey tactical vest over black thermal, utility belt, close-cropped hair
Mira.physical_signature: compact, precise movements, rarely makes eye contact until she has made a decision
Mira.lighting_affinity: motivated practical source, cool ambient fill, minimal key — she does not invite attention

Director Voss.wardrobe_fingerprint: pressed charcoal suit, no tie, single silver signet ring on right hand
Director Voss.physical_signature: measured, economy of gesture, never raises voice, occupies the centre of any frame he enters
Director Voss.lighting_affinity: soft high-key from above, bleached shadows — power expressed as overexposure

district_zero_central.description: Industrial brutalist district, crumbling concrete overpass, sodium-vapour streetlamps, neon signage in Cyrillic and Mandarin, perpetual drizzle
district_zero_central.lighting_condition: sodium-vapour key from above-right, neon fill (magenta/cyan), ground-level practical sources, motivated, no ambient bounce

the_archive.description: Sub-basement record vault, steel shelving floor-to-ceiling, flickering fluorescent tubes, water stains on concrete, smell of ozone
the_archive.lighting_condition: fluorescent overhead, practical motivated, high-frequency flicker on damaged fixtures, pools of shadow between shelves

voss_office.description: Executive office, floor-to-ceiling smoked glass overlooking the district, single curved desk, no decoration except a decommissioned weapon on the wall
voss_office.lighting_condition: overcast exterior fill through glass, single practical desk lamp (warm tungsten), strong backlight from window creates silhouette potential

safe_house_omega.description: Abandoned laundry facility repurposed as a field operations base, hanging plastic sheeting, exposed wiring, temporary lighting rigs
safe_house_omega.lighting_condition: battery-powered work lights (hard, directional), bare-bulb practicals, coloured gels on secondary fills for team identification
